name: /doctor coverage warning includes the count of files in each partial-coverage language
command: mkdir -p repo && for i in 1 2 3; do printf 'package main\n' > repo/m${i}.go; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --check coverage --root repo 2>out.txt && grep -q 'go: 3 files' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
